items.title: Trump tariff refunds begin but consumers likely to miss out
items.dek: Businesses can apply online through a portal for refunds expected to total $160bn.
items.body: Businesses can apply online through a portal for refunds expected to total $160bn.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Outrage over Israeli soldier's vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
items.dek: The Israeli military says it views with "great severity" the actions of the soldier, as the US ambassador demands "swift" consequences.
items.body: The Israeli military says it views with "great severity" the actions of the soldier, as the US ambassador demands "swift" consequences.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nigerian wins global prize for trying to save bats in a country that shuns them
items.dek: Many Nigerians associate bats with witchcraft but that did not deter ecologist Iroro Tanshi.
items.body: Many Nigerians associate bats with witchcraft but that did not deter ecologist Iroro Tanshi.
items.author: IriLine Desk
